log: REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Goblin — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 53/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!

→ Rock: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 34 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 19/67
--- Goblin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 135/138

→ Rock: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 35 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: -16/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
